results.title: All Blacks v France: Live updates from the Nations Championship test in Christchurch
results.description: The All Blacks clash with France in their opening test of the Nations Championship.

results.title: Azerbaijani youth judo team returns home with 10 medals from European Championships
results.description: The Azerbaijani team, which won a historic 10 medals at the 2026 Millennium Team European Cadet Judo Championships in Gran Canaria, Spain, has returned home, Report informs.

results.title: St Johnstone boss Simo Valakari explains tactical change
results.description: The Perth side made a good start to pre-season at Forfar in midweek and now face Montrose.
